name_cn:
🎉New Arrival🎉1BD365 Double Strap 👏👏
Made with imported calf leather and lined with imported sheepskin. Features a flip-top design with 2 detachable and adjustable shoulder straps, suitable for both shoulder and crossbody wear. Perfect for any occasion 👏👏 Large capacity, stylish and minimalist. Get yours now 👏👏 20x16x6cm🎉🎉🎉🎊🎊🎊
